user_intent: Test complementarity under weaker human control.

turns.content: ASA is an external observability architecture that tracks semantic drift across dialogue trajectories.
It includes drift signals, coherence estimation, complementarity analysis, and sovereignty gate decision logic.
The platform can infer when the model starts structurally shaping the exchange more strongly than the human user.
If human initiative weakens while AI structure increases, complementarity may become imbalanced and require confirmation or reanchoring.
